abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Ephemeral (4)
abilities.text: After this model is summoned, it is dealt 4 damage which may not be reduced.

abilities.name: Faraday Collar
abilities.text: After resolving an attack that targeted this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to place the attacking model into base contact with a Shadow Door marker within 6" of it.

actions.name: Spectral Lash
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Fall into Darkness
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with a Shadow Door marker within 6".

actions.name: Claustrophobia
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 1" of blocking terrain, it gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Fall into Darkness
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with a Shadow Door marker within 6".

actions.name: Hallowed Glory
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy models within range must each pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be moved 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Off-Balance
triggers.text: Enemy models that failed the duel gain an Entranced token.

triggers.name: Reclaim Shadow
triggers.text: Remove a Shadow Door marker within 3" of this model. This model heals 2.
